concatenateFile.label: Download and join into one file

cb_subdir.label: CellBender subdirectory (path relative to input file directory)

feature_constant_offset.label: Number of constant basepairs in feature sequences

nprocesses.label: Maximum number of processes to fork off

searchThreads.label: Number of threads to use for hamming search (1:2:4)

consumerThreads.label: Number of threads to process each sample

maxThreads.label: Max total number of threads to use

parallelbyFile.label: Separate thread for each fastq file

process_in_order.label: Do not try to organize by sample name

maximum_mismatch.label: Maximum ambiguous barcodes matched before ignoring

barcode_n.label: Maximum number of N's in cellular barcode

feature_n.label: Maximum number of N's in feature barcode

readBufferLines.label: Number of lines in fastq read buffer

as_named.label: Do not group fastq files by sample name
